# /document

> Post-implement reconcile. Updates domain FDD / TDD / blueprint with actual dataset names + workspace links + refresh history baselines.

## Usage

```
/document [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Execution flow

1. Parse implementation artefacts:
   - PBIT/PBIX metadata (final dataset name, table names, RLS role list)
   - RDL file metadata (final report name, data source, parameter list)
   - Workspace info (published-to workspace; app name when published as app)
   - Refresh schedule final values (after any post-publish tuning)
2. Update domain TDD per-layer block rows tagged with this feature-id.
3. Append per-feature entry to FDD §11 Implementation Log.
4. Mark task cards `documentation-status: done`.
5. Run `doc_lint`.
6. `currentStates += DOCUMENTED`.

## Output

- Updated `fdd.md`, `tdd.md`, `blueprint.md`
- Task cards
